object.field: First batch of vampires that would become the Samhain Coterie. Otto Lübermann and Jakob Luzinski.
Second batch of vampires for the Samhain Coterie: Dominic Braün, Helmut Reichert and Daniel Völker.
Fourth Batch of Vampires for the Samhain Coterie: Linda Gloss and Anita Klugzmann
Third Batch for the Samhain Coterie: Claudius Rotzinger and Martin Merkel.
Tribes: Uktena, Wendigo, Red Talons; Caern: Gnosis 3; Totem: Kawacheta the Bullfrogaa
